mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TB_PSHSUB P USING ( SELECT #{userNumb} AS USER_NUMB , #{endpUrlx} AS ENDP_URLX , #{p256Keyx,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS P256_KEYX , #{authKeyx,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS AUTH_KEYX FROM DUAL ) S ON (P.USER_NUMB = S.USER_NUMB AND P.ENDP_URLX = S.ENDP_URLX) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET P.P256_KEYX = S.P256_KEYX , P.AUTH_KEYX = S.AUTH_KEYX , P.USEE_YSNO = #{commYes} , P.UPDT_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_NUMB, ENDP_URLX, P256_KEYX, AUTH_KEYX, USEE_YSNO, REGI_DATE) VALUES (S.USER_NUMB, S.ENDP_URLX, S.P256_KEYX, S.AUTH_KEYX, #{commYes}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT /* getActivePushSubList */ USER_NUMB , ENDP_URLX , P256_KEYX , AUTH_KEYX , USEE_YSNO FROM TB_PSHSUB WHERE USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND USEE_YSNO = #{commYes}
